nasb.text: But He overthrew Pharaoh and his army in the Red Sea, For His lovingkindness is everlasting.

esv.text: but overthrew Pharaoh and his host in the Red Sea, for his steadfast love endures forever;

cnv.text: 他把法老和他的軍兵都抖落在紅海裡， 因為他的慈愛永遠長存。

ccb.text: 祂让法老和他的军兵葬身红海， 因为祂的慈爱永远长存。

csbs.text: 却把法老和他的军队抖落在红海中， 因他的慈爱永远长存！
